# Allude to Nivana’s black-sheep uncle

Priority: Low
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)
Scenes: Mediev family conversation (../Scenes/Mediev%20family%20conversation%202aa58e628ba2806cb21cfcd50621bcfb.md)

Allude to [Nivana](../Data/Characters/Nivana%20a2ee9cd0a28b4945af74fd3022fd97af.md)’s uncle, [The Merchant of Sorcerers](../Data/Characters/The%20Merchant%20of%20Sorcerers%20c48080a70bbb443a8eba9c60d24bd331.md), without mentioning his name or occupation.
